feats.name: Alert
feats.summary: You gain proficiency in Initiative and can swap your Initiative with a willing ally after rolls are made.

feats.name: Magic Initiate (Cleric)
feats.summary: You learn two Cleric cantrips and one 1st-level Cleric spell; you cast the 1st-level spell once per Long Rest without a slot and may swap it on a Long Rest.

feats.name: Magic Initiate (Druid)
feats.summary: You learn two Druid cantrips and one 1st-level Druid spell; you cast the 1st-level spell once per Long Rest without a slot and may swap it on a Long Rest.

feats.name: Magic Initiate (Wizard)
feats.summary: You learn two Wizard cantrips and one 1st-level Wizard spell; you cast the 1st-level spell once per Long Rest without a slot and may swap it on a Long Rest.

feats.name: Savage Attacker
feats.summary: Once per turn when you roll damage for a melee weapon attack, you can reroll the damage dice and use either total.

feats.name: Skilled
feats.summary: You gain proficiency in any combination of three skills or tools of your choice.

feats.name: Ability Score Improvement
feats.summary: You increase one ability score by 2 or two ability scores by 1 each, up to a maximum of 20.

feats.name: Grappler
feats.summary: You gain +1 to Strength or Dexterity (max 20), advantage on attacks against grappled creatures, and can attempt to pin a grappled creature as an action.

feats.name: Archery
feats.summary: You gain a +2 bonus to attack rolls made with ranged weapons.

feats.name: Defense
feats.summary: While wearing armor, you gain a +1 bonus to Armor Class.

feats.name: Great Weapon Fighting
feats.summary: When you roll a 1 or 2 on a damage die for an attack with a Heavy or Versatile weapon held in two hands, you can reroll that die and must use the new result.

feats.name: Two-Weapon Fighting
feats.summary: When you make the bonus attack from Two-Weapon Fighting, you can add your ability modifier to that attack's damage roll.

feats.name: Boon of Combat Prowess
feats.summary: You increase one ability score by 1 (max 20) and once per Short Rest can replace a failed melee attack roll with a hit.

feats.name: Boon of Dimensional Travel
feats.summary: You increase one ability score by 1 (max 20) and after taking the Attack action can teleport up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space you can see.
